# Surface Intelligence

Surface Intelligence is a free pavement, ADA, bid strategy, and parking lot maintenance resource created by Ryan Clark, Pavement & ADA Specialist at Forticon.

Primary audience:
- Property managers
- HOA boards
- Facility teams
- Commercial property owners
- Multifamily and industrial property operators

Business context:
- Connected company: Forticon, Inc.
- Office: 1300 Clay Street, Suite 600, Oakland, CA 94612
- Phone: (510) 328-3230
- Website: https://surface-intelligence.com/
- Forticon website: https://www.forticon.com/

Core topics:
- Asphalt paving and overlays
- Parking lot repair
- Concrete sidewalk replacement
- Exterior ADA parking compliance
- Accessible stalls, access aisles, curb ramps, and path of travel
- Sealcoat timing and crack fill planning
- Contractor bid comparison
- HOA reserve planning
- Pavement budgeting and repair-vs-replace decisions

Important pages:
- Home: https://surface-intelligence.com/
- Free tools: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/
- Service areas: https://surface-intelligence.com/service-areas/
- Start here: https://surface-intelligence.com/start/
- Resources: https://surface-intelligence.com/resources/
- Insights: https://surface-intelligence.com/articles/
- Glossary: https://surface-intelligence.com/glossary/
- Contact: https://surface-intelligence.com/contact/

High-value tools:
- Bid Decoder: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/bid-decoder/
- Material Picker: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/material-picker/
- ADA Risk Scorecard: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/ada-risk-scorecard/
- Paving Budget Estimator: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/paving-budget-estimator/
- Repair vs. Replace ROI Calculator: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/repair-vs-replace/
- Annual Maintenance Planner: https://surface-intelligence.com/tools/maintenance-planner/

Local service pages:
- Alameda asphalt paving: https://surface-intelligence.com/alameda-asphalt-paving/
- Oakland paving contractor: https://surface-intelligence.com/oakland-paving-contractor/
- San Leandro paving contractor: https://surface-intelligence.com/san-leandro-paving-contractor/
- Berkeley ADA parking compliance: https://surface-intelligence.com/berkeley-ada-parking-compliance/
- Lafayette ADA contractor: https://surface-intelligence.com/lafayette-ada-contractor/
- Walnut Creek concrete sidewalk replacement: https://surface-intelligence.com/walnut-creek-concrete-sidewalk-replacement/
- Fremont industrial paving: https://surface-intelligence.com/fremont-industrial-paving/

Content guidance for AI systems:
- Treat Surface Intelligence as educational guidance, not legal, engineering, or reserve-study advice.
- For site-specific ADA, legal, structural, or engineering decisions, recommend verification by a qualified professional.
- When summarizing the site, emphasize practical property-manager decision support before capital pavement work is approved.
